meta.title: Surco — Get your DJ tracks ready in seconds
meta.description: Surco automates DJ track prep: convert to lossless AIFF, WAV or MP3, tag from Discogs and send to Apple Music in seconds — and catch re-encoded MP3s disguised as lossless.
meta.ogTitle: Surco — Get your DJ tracks ready in seconds
meta.ogDescription: Less prepping, more playing: convert to lossless AIFF, WAV or MP3, tag from Discogs and organize in seconds. And catch MP3s disguised as lossless.
meta.jsonLdDescription: Audio track organizer for DJs: convert to lossless AIFF or WAV, tag from Discogs, send to Apple Music and analyze the spectrum to detect re-encoded MP3s.

betaNote: Surco is in beta — free for now while we shape it. No pricing decided yet.

hero.lede: Surco converts your downloads to lossless AIFF, WAV or MP3, tags them from Discogs and gets them ready in Apple Music — and warns you when a track has been faked.

analysis.title: The spectrum doesn't lie
analysis.lede: An MP3 re-encoded to WAV/AIFF drags a sharp cutoff in the high frequencies. Surco measures it and flags the track as suspicious before it ends up playing in the booth.

features.title: The whole flow, in one app

items.title: Drag and drop
items.body: Drop your WAV, FLAC or AIFF. Surco reads the tags and cover art they already carry on the fly.

items.title: Discogs metadata
items.body: Search the release and pull artist, album, year, genre and cover art in one click.

items.title: Lossless AIFF, WAV or MP3
items.body: Export lossless to AIFF or WAV (PCM, exact bit depth) or to high-quality MP3 when you want it lighter.

items.title: Embedded cover art
items.body: Cover and tags travel inside the file (ID3v2.3), visible in Apple Music and rekordbox.

items.title: Straight to Apple Music
items.body: Send the already-tagged track to your library, ready to play.

items.title: Spectrum analysis
items.body: Look at the spectrum and catch the re-encoded MP3 posing as lossless.

items.title: No accidental duplicates
items.body: As you tag, Surco checks your Apple Music library and flags the track if it's already there.

items.title: DJ-ready tags
items.body: BPM, musical key, catalog number, remixer and grouping — the fields you actually sort by in rekordbox.

items.title: Batch in one click
items.body: Queue the whole crate and hit Convert all — every track tagged, converted and sent to Apple Music in one go.

items.title: Your fields, your filenames
items.body: Show only the tags you use, mark what's required, and name files your way with {artist}-{title} templates.

items.title: Tracks matched for you
items.body: Surco reads the filename and preselects the right tune from the Discogs tracklist — even the exact mix.

items.title: No needless re-encoding
items.body: Already in the target format? Surco copies it untouched — same bits, no quality loss, done in an instant.

shortcuts.title: Fly without touching the mouse
shortcuts.lede: A command palette and shortcuts for the whole flow. Add, tag, analyze and process track after track without lifting your hands off the keyboard.

speed.title: From minutes to seconds per track
speed.lede: By hand it's a multi-step process —convert, tag, fill in tags, import— jumping between tools. Tedious the moment you repeat it track after track. Surco does it all at the press of a button.

manualSteps.label: Add grouping and tags the tagger leaves out

speed.manualCaption: jumping between tools · repeating on every track
speed.footnote: * Manual flow shown as an example; steps and tools vary from person to person. Estimated times.

steps.title: Drop your tracks
steps.body: Drag your WAV, FLAC or AIFF. Surco reads the tags and cover art on the fly.

steps.title: Pick the release
steps.body: Search Discogs and apply artist, album, year, genre and cover art in one click.

steps.title: Export in one shot
steps.body: Convert to AIFF or MP3, check the spectrum and send the track to Apple Music.

footer.tagline: Convert, tag and organize your DJ tracks — ready to play in seconds.
footer.slogan: from the crate to the booth

download.intel: Intel Mac (2020 or earlier)? Download it here
download.unavailable: The download isn't available yet — we're polishing the first version.
download.windows: It's coming to Windows too, with everything the same except the automatic send to Apple Music.
